zh.lifeSummary: 當Susanna Martha Tuffnell於1608年出生在英國肯特騰特爾登時，她的父親Tuffnell24歲，母親Mary Leonard19歲。她於1639年與Nathaniel Ely Jr在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1683年10月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德享年75歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susanna Martha Tuffnell于1608年出生在英国肯特騰特爾登时，她的父亲Tuffnell24岁，母亲Mary Leonard19岁。她于1639年与Nathaniel Ely Jr在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1683年10月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德享年75岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Tuffnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from a lost or unidentified place-name, perhaps the field in Harpenden (Herts) recorded as Tuffnales in 1520, though this may derive from the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Susanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzannah
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

variants.name: Suzanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Susanna Martha Tuffnell was born in 1608, in Tenterden, Kent, England, her father, Tuffnell, was 24 and her mother, Mary Leonard, was 19. She married Nathaniel Ely Jr in 1639, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 23 October 1683, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 75, and was buried in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susanna Martha Tuffnell est née en 1608, à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Tuffnell, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mary Leonard, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Nathaniel Ely Jr en 1639, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 octobre 1683, à Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Martha Tuffnell è nata il nel 1608 nel Tenterden, Kent, England, sua padre, Tuffnell, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Mary Leonard, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Nathaniel Ely Jr nel 1639, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Susanna Martha Tuffnellが1608年にイギリスケントテンテルデンで生まれた時，父Tuffnellは24歳，母Mary Leonardは19歳であった。1639年にイギリスでNathaniel Ely Jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1683年10月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドで75歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドスプリングフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Susanna Martha Tuffnell(이)가 1608년 영국 켄트 텐터든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Tuffnell(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Leonard(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1639년 영국에서 Nathaniel Ely Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1683년 10월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susanna Martha Tuffnell nasceu em 1608, em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Tuffnell, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mary Leonard, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Nathaniel Ely Jr em 1639, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1683, em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susanna Martha Tuffnell родилась в 1608 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Tuffnell было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Leonard, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathaniel Ely Jr в 1639 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 октября 1683 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности спрингфиелд кеметири, спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susanna Martha Tuffnell nació en 1608, en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Tuffnell, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mary Leonard, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Nathaniel Ely Jr en 1639, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1683, en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
